name: 深情告白型
description: 用克制而深沉的語言表達長年累月的感情，不煽情但感人。通常包含時間量詞（八年、一直）來強調深情的厚度。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: I've loved you for 8 years. I'm not leaving now or ever. ... I'm never going to let anyone hurt her again. I swear.
